text.title: Release Planning Examples
text.summary: SaaS monthly feature release and solo product patch release worked examples.

example.note: v2.4.0 — Goal: enable team collaboration. Contents: real-time collaboration feature, comments on tasks, 15 bug fixes.
Timeline: Monday feature freeze and testing, Wednesday staging deploy and final QA, Thursday 2pm production deploy, Thursday customer email and blog post.
Success metric: team features used by 20% of active users within the first week.
v1.2.3 — Goal: fix critical payment processing bug. Contents: payment fix, 2 minor UI bugs.
Timeline: same-day deploy, quick changelog update, email to affected customers only.
Success metric: zero payment failures post-deploy.
